final:
module top_module(
    input SEL,
    input [31:0] IN0,
    input [31:0] IN1,
    
    output reg [31:0] OUT
    );always @(SEL,IN0,IN1)
        case (SEL)
            1'b0: OUT <= IN0;
            1'b1: OUT <= IN1;
        endcase    
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      OUT <= IN1;
    end
  end

endmodule
